description: Measures the Audit Tax: latency overhead of full audit trail vs minimal audit surface.

minimal audit (pure flow).note: pure flow — no audit.write effect, no AuditEvent emitted on clean run

full audit (secure flow).note: secure flow — govComment annotations collected into manifest narrative

complianceChecks.note: If auditTaxPct > 50%, governance observability overhead is considered excessive

interpretation.goal: Make the audit tax as small as possible. Stage B WASM path target: < 5%.
